## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (documentation, script, or link correction)
- [ ] New module content (lesson.md / exercise / verify / hints)
- [ ] Structural update (SYLLABUS, READING, ARCHITECTURE)
- [ ] Infrastructure (GitHub Pages, templates, CI)

---

## For new module content — checklist

- [ ] I ran the exercise on actual hardware (not simulated output)
- [ ] The verify script actually passes on a correct run
- [ ] The hints file does not give away the exercise — it gives a direction
- [ ] lesson.md has a "WHAT YOU'LL BUILD" section and a "WHAT YOU PROVED" section
- [ ] Hardware tier is clearly documented in the lesson
